title: HookPatch
description: The ONLY thing a transform hook may return (spec §28.17, TOL-012): a patch to the arguments a before_tool call will execute with, or the result an after_tool call delivers to the model. It carries NO capability field — there is deliberately no tools/model/budget/secret property, so a hook can never grant itself or the model a new capability (TestHookCannotGrantCapability). A remote hook's response is strict-decoded (DisallowUnknownFields) against this shape, so an out-of-schema field is rejected fail-closed. additionalProperties is false: this is a closed shape.

arguments.description: The replacement arguments a before_tool call executes with (and the ledger arguments column records — honest audit of what actually ran). Ignored at any non-before_tool point.

result.description: The replacement result an after_tool call delivers to the model. Ignored at any non-after_tool point.
